repo.name: open-telemetry/opentelemetry-demo
repo._base_commit: source checkout required; record the commit used for reproduction
repo._note: Set repo.local_path to a local checkout of repo.name before running experiments.

ground_truth_notes: Rich function: 1 span_start ('get_product_list'), ~7 span_attributes (cache_enabled, cache_hit×2, products.count, filtered_products.count, filtered_products.list), 2 log_info (cache miss / cache hit). The 'with tracer.start_as_current_span(...) as span:' block is the structural signal.
